hero.description: A Discord bot that supports voice channel statistics, automatic channel creation, music playback, and more

voiceStats.title: Voice Channel Statistics
voiceStats.description: Track each member's voice channel time and view daily/weekly/monthly statistics on the dashboard

autoChannel.title: Auto Channel Creation
autoChannel.description: A personal channel is automatically created when you join a designated voice channel, and deleted when everyone leaves

music.title: Music Playback
music.description: Play YouTube music in a voice channel with the /play command

gemini.title: Gemini Voice Analysis
gemini.description: Analyze voice channel conversations with Gemini AI to generate summary reports

newbie.title: Welcome New Members
newbie.description: Automatically sends a welcome message when a new member joins the server

dashboard.title: Web Dashboard
dashboard.description: Log in with Discord to manage bot settings and statistics from the web

setup.sectionDescription: Role configuration is required for all bot features to work properly

step1.title: Add the Bot to Your Server
step1.description: Click the "Add to Server" button above to invite the bot. Only the minimum required permissions are requested.

step2.title: Move the Bot Role to the Top
step2.description: Features like nickname changes and role management only apply to members below the bot role according to Discord's role hierarchy rules.
step2.step2: Drag the Onyu role above the roles you want to manage
step2.notice: * The server owner's nickname cannot be changed by any bot

step3.title: Configure in the Web Dashboard
step3.description: Log in with your Discord account, then configure auto channels, welcome messages, and other features in the dashboard.
